title: G.S.R. 295 (E) 29th April 1999
text: REGD. NO, D. L.-33004/98 The Gazette of India EXTRAORDINARY PART II—Section 3-Sub-section (1) PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY No. 2031 NEW DELHI, THURSDAY, APRIL 29,1999/VAISAKHA 9,1921 MINISTRY OF AGRICULTURE (Department of Agriculture & Co-operation) CORRIGENDUM New Delhi, the 28th April, 1999 G.S.R 295 (E).—In the English version of the Notification of the Government of India, in the Ministry of Agricul- ture, Department of Agriculture & Co-operation G.S.R dated the 2nd July, 1998 published in the Gazette of India (Extraordinary), Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (i) dated the 6th July, 1998 : (A) At Page 10:— . (a) (b) (0 (d) (e) in column 1, line 1, for 'G.S.R.', read 'G.S.R, 379(E)' in column 1, line 14, for 'of read 'or' ; in column 2, line 1, for 'R' read '(r)' ; in sub para '(r)' so corrected— (i) for 'post1, read 'pest' wherever it occurs ; (ii) for 'serial', read 'aerial'; in column 2, line 8. for '(S)' read '(s)'. (B) (C) At page 12 :— (a) in Form VI-A,— (i) in para 8, for 'applicances', read 'applications'; (ii) At page 13 in para 14, for 'funigation', read 'fumigation'. At page 13 :— (a) in Form VI-B,— (i) in the title, for 'post', read 'pest' ; (ii) in para 1 :— (a) in line 2, for 'icence', read 'licence'; (b) in line 3, for 'llicence' read 'licence'; -- 1 of 4 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(i)] (D) At page 14 :— in Form VI-C, for the word 'post', wherever it occurs, read 'pest', (!)
